description: You are an electronics technician designing a cable gland body. Create a cylinder with a radius of 15 mm and a height of 40 mm, positioned at the origin (0, 0, 0) with its axis along Z. Create a rectangular through-slot in the cylinder using a box with dimensions 40 mm (X), 5 mm (Y), and 20 mm (Z), positioned so the slot passes through the center of the cylinder from Z=10 to Z=30. Save the document to ~/Documents/FreeCAD/slotted_cylinder.FCStd.
